sglang.title: Added async_encode method to Engine
sglang.author: shimizust
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Having an async encode API is useful when wrapping the Engine within a custom gRPC/HTTP async service framework
Maintains consistency with existing async_generate API pattern

Modifications

Added async_encode method to Engine
Added test to confirm consistency between encode and async_en

sglang.title: Fix data parallel perf regression
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
#4499 introduced a regression because it add a busy while loop in the data_parallel_controller.py
This PR makes it sleep instead of busy waiting

sglang.title: Fix request abortion
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Move del self.rid_to_state[rid] out of TokenizerManager::abort_request
Do not send dummy output from the delayed token from the overlap scheduler
Collect metrics for aborted requests
Move custom_logit_processor check to tokenizer_manager.py

sglang.title: [CI] Disabled deepep tests temporarily because it takes too much time.
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
We can re-enable them after doing the following enhancements.

Do not compile from scratch every time. Utilize the compilation cache.
Use a smaller model lmsys/sglang-ci-dsv3-test for most tests
Call scripts/ci_install_dependency.sh in scripts/ci_install_dependency_8_gpu.sh to reduce code duplicatio

vllm.title: [v1] Pass BlockTable and KVCacheSpec to AttentionMetadataBuilders
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Should merge after #17394
Hybrid allocator will need to build attention metadata for each kv cache group because different kv cache groups may have different attention type and block_table. To achieve that, we will introduce one AttentionMetadataBuilder and one BlockTable for each group.

vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #17474 changes class SpecializedManager to class SingleTypeKVCacheManager. This PR renames that file to ensure the consistency.

vllm.title: [Kernel] fp4 marlin kernel
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds nvfp4 support for marlin kernel, both dense and moe.
In addition to standard FP4 support, I fuse the floating-point operations in the dequantization process with the subsequent sub-zero-point and scaling steps to reduce kernel computation. This currently provides significant speedups fo
